# Derivatives and Differential Equations {#sec-appx-deriv .unnumbered}

<!-- Derivative as a fundamental component of modeling.
     Rate of something over something else over infinitesimally small intervals.
     d = differential = "a very small change in..."
     Examples:
       dT/dt = rate of change of temperature over time
       dT/dx = gradient in temperature over space
     ODEs.
     PDEs: partial derivatives (symbol ∂) imply the numerator also depends on other variables. -->
